title: Alpha's Rise
description: The Alpha's themselves will be awakened. A addon for the Isle of Berk mod.
body:
This mod adds the HTTYD Alpha dragons themselves.

**THIS MOD REQUIRES:**

- Isle Of Berk
- Isle Of Berk Variant Loader
- Archipelago Additions

**OPTIONAL FOR THE MOD**
- EasyNPCs mod for structure NPCs
- Configs will be downloadable (for skins)

**Alpha dragons that will be in this mod:**

- Bewilderbeast
- Purple Death
- Foreverwing
- Red Death
- Shellfire

**CREDITS**

Most dragon models use IoB models as a base due to hardcoded rigging dependencies making it impractical to scratch model. Alpha's Rise does not claim to have made these models, they were created by the IoB team and now belong to NBD. We are permitted use of these IoB base assets provided we remain as an addon to IoB and/or NBD and do not claim to have made them.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86f188067a67ddb3d0ee3fae84584f3057c56051.png)
